meta.title: Ishbor — Verified Skills & Jobs
meta.description: Pass a secure skill assessment, earn a verified level and find a job. For employers: hire verified specialists.

nav.logoutAllConfirm: Sign out of all devices? Sessions on your other phones/computers will end too.

auth.title: Ishbor Skill Verification
auth.subtitle: Pass the test to earn a Verified badge.
auth.name: Name
auth.roleSeekerHint: Pass the test and post your resume.
auth.passwordPolicyHint: At least 8 characters: uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a symbol (e.g. !@#$).
auth.passwordPolicyError: Password must be at least 8 characters and include an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter, a number, and a symbol.

jobs.title: Job listings
jobs.subtitle: Employers and job seekers in one place — filter by direction and level.
jobs.searchPlaceholder: Search by role, company or candidate…
jobs.noRating: This user hasn't taken the skill assessment yet.
jobs.promoBody: Take the test and earn a verified level — your listing looks more trustworthy.
jobs.guestPrompt: Log in to track your activity.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Users with the highest scores.
leaderboard.empty: No one has taken the test yet.

post.title: New listing
post.employerHint: Post a vacancy — no test required.
post.seekerNote: This is your verified level — it will be attached to your resume.
post.resumeTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Looking for a Junior Frontend Developer role
post.lockedBody: To post a resume you must first pass the skill test and become verified.
post.verifiedNote: You are verified — you can post listings.
post.errSalaryRange: The lower salary bound must not exceed the upper one

test.title: Skill test
test.selectIntro: Choose your direction and mark the technologies you know. You'll get the hardest questions for each.
test.techHint: {count, plural, one {# question} other {# questions}} per technology. 20 seconds each.
test.selectedSummary: {techs, plural, =0 {No technologies} one {# technology} other {# technologies}} · {questions, plural, one {# question} other {# questions}}
test.notAnswered: Not answered — counts as wrong when time runs out
test.terminated: The assessment was terminated for too many tab switches.

admin.name: Name
admin.confirmDeleteUser: Are you sure you want to delete this user? All their listings and sessions will also be removed.
admin.confirmDeleteJob: Are you sure you want to delete this listing?
admin.flagIpMismatch: IP address differed between start and finish
admin.flagSuspiciouslyFast: Test finished implausibly fast for a human
admin.title: Title
admin.author: Author

proctor.violationBody: You left the test window. This has been recorded as a violation — if you exceed the limit, the test will be terminated automatically.
proctor.violationBodyCopyPaste: Copy or paste detected. This has been recorded as a violation — if you exceed the limit, the test will be terminated automatically.
proctor.violationBodyRightClick: Right-click menu detected. This has been recorded as a violation — if you exceed the limit, the test will be terminated automatically.
proctor.violationBodyScreenshot: Screenshot attempt (PrintScreen) detected. This has been recorded as a violation — if you exceed the limit, the test will be terminated automatically.
proctor.violationBodyDevtools: Browser Developer Tools (DevTools) opening detected. This has been recorded as a violation — if you exceed the limit, the test will be terminated automatically.
proctor.violationBodyBot: Automated browser (bot/script) detected. This has been recorded as a violation — if you exceed the limit, the test will be terminated automatically.
proctor.violationRemaining: {remaining} more such actions will terminate the test.

result.late: Submitted after the deadline — the result was flagged as expired.
